summary: Iteration 68: Trade Karma Reputation System - All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Trade Circle shows karma stat with tier name in stats bar, clicking karma stat opens karma profile modal showing points/tier/trades/reviews, Karma Board tab displays leaderboard, karma tiers grid (Seedling/Sprout/Bloom/Guardian/Elder/Luminary), and 'How to Earn Karma' section. Review modal available on accepted offers. Existing trade circle features (browse, create listing, make offer) continue working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 68 verified Trade Karma system. Backend: GET /api/trade-circle/stats returns karma, karma_tier, review_count, avg_rating. GET /api/trade-circle/karma/{user_id} returns karma profile. POST /api/trade-circle/reviews creates reviews with validation (rating 1-5, offer_id required, no duplicates, participant-only). GET /api/trade-circle/karma-leaderboard returns top karma holders. Karma awards: +10 trade completed, +3 review given, +1 listing created, +1 offer made. Frontend: Stats bar shows Trade Karma with tier name (Seedling at 3 pts). Clicking karma stat opens profile modal. Karma Board tab shows leaderboard, 6 tier cards, and earning guide. Test user has 3 karma points (Seedling tier).

backend_api.GET /api/trade-circle/stats: ✓ Returns karma, karma_tier, review_count, avg_rating alongside existing stats
backend_api.GET /api/trade-circle/karma/{user_id}: ✓ Returns karma profile with points, tier, reviews, completed_trades
backend_api.GET /api/trade-circle/karma-leaderboard: ✓ Returns leaderboard array with user_id, name, points, tier

frontend_ui.karma_stat_in_stats_bar: ✓ Shows '3 Trade Karma Seedling' in stats bar
frontend_ui.karma_profile_modal: ✓ Opens on karma stat click, shows tier icon, name, points, trades, rating, reviews
frontend_ui.karma_board_tab: ✓ Shows Karma Leaderboard, Karma Tiers grid, How to Earn Karma section
frontend_ui.karma_tiers_grid: ✓ Shows all 6 tiers: Seedling (0+), Sprout (10+), Bloom (30+), Guardian (60+), Elder (100+), Luminary (200+)
frontend_ui.how_to_earn_karma: ✓ Shows: Complete trade +10, Leave review +3, Create listing +1, Make offer +1
frontend_ui.browse_tab: ✓ Shows listings with search and category filters
frontend_ui.existing_features: ✓ All existing trade circle features work
